name: 20" Round Wall Mirror Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Upgrade the look of your wall space with this Round Wall Mirror from Room Essentials™. This wall mirror is designed in a round shape and features a glossy-finish polyethylene frame for modern appeal. Easy to mount on any wall, this mirror gives you space a welcoming look and makes it easy to check your reflection.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
